title: [App] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Verify that a standalone headset (not paired with Charge Case) displays only headset battery indicator and shows only headset information in Settings > Software update.
steps: Connect the headset as a standalone device (not paired with the Charge Case).
Verify that the device is displayed as a standalone headset.
Check that only the battery indicator for the headset is shown.
Verify that only information about the headset is displayed.
expected: The device is displayed as a standalone headset with only the headset battery indicator. In Settings > Software update, only headset-related information is shown.
